title: eriogonum niveum var. dichotomum
intro: Eriogonum niveum var. dichotomum, also known as the dichotomous snowbush, is a shrubby perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Eriogonum niveum var. dichotomum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune system function. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in topical applications, such as salves and poultices, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
